title: helianthemum halimifolium subsp. multiflorum
intro: Helianthemum halimifolium subsp. multiflorum is a plant species in the rockrose family, known for its small, fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum halimifolium subsp. multiflorum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
